verses.text: Moses calls Israel to hear the covenant made at Horeb. The covenant. God spoke face to face.
Moses calls Israel to hear the covenant made at Horeb. The covenant. God spoke face to face.
Moses calls Israel to hear the covenant made at Horeb. The covenant. God spoke face to face.
Moses calls Israel to hear the covenant made at Horeb. The covenant. God spoke face to face.
Moses calls Israel to hear the covenant made at Horeb. The covenant. God spoke face to face.
'I am the LORD thy God... Thou shalt have none other gods.' One God. He alone is worshipped.
'I am the LORD thy God... Thou shalt have none other gods.' One God. He alone is worshipped.
Make no graven image; He is a jealous God. No idols. Worship is pure.
Make no graven image; He is a jealous God. No idols. Worship is pure.
Make no graven image; He is a jealous God. No idols. Worship is pure.
Take not the name of the LORD in vain. Reverence. His name is holy.
Keep the sabbath, remembering their bondage in Egypt. Rest. Even servants rest.
Keep the sabbath, remembering their bondage in Egypt. Rest. Even servants rest.
Keep the sabbath, remembering their bondage in Egypt. Rest. Even servants rest.
Keep the sabbath, remembering their bondage in Egypt. Rest. Even servants rest.
Honour thy father and thy mother. Honour. The home is sacred.
Kill not, commit not adultery, steal not, lie not, covet not. Neighbour. Love guards all.
Kill not, commit not adultery, steal not, lie not, covet not. Neighbour. Love guards all.
Kill not, commit not adultery, steal not, lie not, covet not. Neighbour. Love guards all.
Kill not, commit not adultery, steal not, lie not, covet not. Neighbour. Love guards all.
Kill not, commit not adultery, steal not, lie not, covet not. Neighbour. Love guards all.
God spoke these words from the fire and wrote them on stone. Spoken. The law came from God Himself.
God spoke these words from the fire and wrote them on stone. Spoken. The law came from God Himself.
God spoke these words from the fire and wrote them on stone. Spoken. The law came from God Himself.
The people fear and beg Moses to hear for them. Fear. They tremble at God's voice.
The people fear and beg Moses to hear for them. Fear. They tremble at God's voice.
The people fear and beg Moses to hear for them. Fear. They tremble at God's voice.
God approves, wishing they had such a heart always. Their heart. God longs for steady obedience.
God approves, wishing they had such a heart always. Their heart. God longs for steady obedience.
God approves, wishing they had such a heart always. Their heart. God longs for steady obedience.
God approves, wishing they had such a heart always. Their heart. God longs for steady obedience.
Walk in all His ways, that it be well with you. Walk. Obedience brings blessing.
Walk in all His ways, that it be well with you. Walk. Obedience brings blessing.
